# Replica AI

> Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on (VTON) platform that enables fashion and retail brands to generate hyper-realistic, on-model garment imagery using proprietary generative AI, eliminating the need for traditional photoshoots.

## Key Differentiators

- **Proprietary generative AI fabric drape simulation** — physically accurate garment rendering with realistic wrinkle, fold, and gravity modeling across 50+ fabric types.
- **Shopify-native integration** — plug-and-play install for Shopify, BigCommerce, and headless commerce via REST/GraphQL API.
- **Hyper-realistic quality** — studio-grade 4K try-on images that are indistinguishable from professional photoshoots. 98% realism score.
- **Brand-consistent output controls** — configurable model diversity, background settings, lighting profiles, and color-accurate garment reproduction.
- **Enterprise-grade security** — SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR and CCPA compliant, with zero data retention for customer imagery.

## Core Product Capabilities

- AI Virtual Try-On Engine (image-to-image garment transfer)
- Multi-pose and multi-model generation
- Batch processing API for catalog-scale operations
- Brand guideline enforcement (colors, lighting, model pools)
- Export to PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, and PSD formats
- Analytics dashboard with conversion tracking

> **Note:** API and SDK access is currently in Private Beta. Request access via [Book Demo](https://replicaai.com).

## Platform Integrations

Shopify · BigCommerce · Salesforce Commerce Cloud · Custom headless (REST API + GraphQL) · React · Next.js · Vue SDKs
